## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting for Metronome project](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The Metronome project is being launched, with key stakeholders from Metronome and growthx.ai in attendance](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [The meeting covered initial topics and set the stage for next steps in the project](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview

  - [David Edoh-Bedi provided a high-level overview of the Metronome project, its goals, and the key stakeholders involved](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Megan LaFlamme and Maddy Fennessy from Metronome shared additional context on the project's scope and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Roles and Responsibilities

  - [The group discussed the roles and responsibilities of each participant, including David, Megan, Maddy, Maggie, and George from growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [They outlined how the team will collaborate and coordinate on the project](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Next Steps

  - [The team agreed on several next steps, including:](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [Scheduling a follow-up meeting to dive deeper into project requirements](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Establishing regular check-in cadence and communication channels](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Identifying any additional stakeholders or resources needed to support the project](https://fathom.video/share/6dmsyhBKsG1U78Zs9yudqUXZznXvCokb?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
